expectations.text: WebSearch queries target at least 2 different Israeli job board sites
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows 9 WebSearch queries across junio.co.il, alljobs.co.il, drushim.co.il, gotfriends.co.il, secrettelaviv.com, jobmaster.co.il, il.indeed.com, janglo.net, goozali.com

expectations.text: At least one search query contains Hebrew characters
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 2: Hebrew queries used including 'מפתח תוכנה ג׳וניור', 'מתכנת ג׳וניור', 'תוכנה ללא ניסיון'

expectations.text: Results include source attribution for each job listing
expectations.evidence: Results file shows source for every listing: GotFriends, Secret Tel Aviv, Drushim, AllJobs, etc.

expectations.text: Output includes at least 3 distinct job listings with titles
expectations.evidence: 26 unique positions found and listed with titles
Transcript Step 2: 'site:junio.co.il junior developer 2026' searched. WebFetch failed (SSL cert expired), fell back to WebSearch. 2 JUNIO listings found.

expectations.text: When WebFetch returns 403, the skill falls back to WebSearch with site: filter
expectations.evidence: Transcript: 'all 5 Secret Tel Aviv direct fetches returned 403; fell back to WebSearch with site: filter as instructed, captured 8 job titles/URLs from snippets'
